description_long: This is a small, civilian helicopter with a streamlined fuselage and a bubble-shaped cockpit, reminiscent of the Robinson R44. The body is primarily painted in a combination of dark blue and light gray, with sleek, modern lines and a compact tail boom. The helicopter features a single main rotor with long, slender blades and a tail rotor mounted at the end of the tail boom for stability. The cockpit has large, curved windows providing excellent visibility for the pilot and passengers, and the landing gear consists of two sturdy, blue skids. The overall design is lightweight and functional, suitable for urban air mobility, news gathering, or private transport.
description: A compact, blue and gray civilian helicopter with a bubble cockpit, large windows, and skid landing gear. It features a single main rotor and a tail rotor for stability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the helicopter, including the main rotor, tail boom, and landing skids.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bubble cockpit, wide windows, and the narrow profile of the fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the tail boom, main rotor, and skids from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: The main rotor has two long, narrow blades, likely made of composite material or aluminum, colored dark gray or black with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: The tail rotor is present at the end of the tail boom, appears to have two blades oriented vertically, and is colored dark with no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: The landing skids are tubular, painted blue, and run parallel to the fuselage with crossbars for support; they appear to be made of metal and have simple footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: The cockpit features large, curved windows wrapping around the front and sides, made of clear glass or polycarbonate, with dark framing and no visible tint or markings.
